name: Slider
searchText: slider slider component @mantine/core /core/slider color defaultvalue disabled domain hiddeninputprops inverted label labelalwayson labeltransitionprops marks max min name onchange onchangeend orientation precision radius restricttomarks scale showlabelonhover size step thumbchildren thumblabel thumbprops thumbsize value

props.name: color
props.description: Key of theme.colors or any valid CSS color, controls color of track and thumb

props.name: defaultValue
props.description: Uncontrolled component default value

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disables slider

props.name: domain
props.description: Domain of the slider, defines the selectable value range independently of min/max. Useful when you want to display a wider track range (min/max) but restrict actual selection to a subset (domain).

props.name: hiddenInputProps
props.description: Props passed down to the hidden input

props.name: inverted
props.description: Determines whether track value representation should be inverted

props.name: label
props.description: Function to generate label or any react node to render instead, set to null to disable label

props.name: labelAlwaysOn
props.description: Determines whether the label should be visible when the slider is not being dragged or hovered

props.name: labelTransitionProps
props.description: Props passed down to the Transition component

props.name: marks
props.description: Marks displayed on the track

props.name: max
props.description: Maximum possible value

props.name: min
props.description: Minimal possible value

props.name: name
props.description: Hidden input name, use with uncontrolled component

props.name: onChange
props.description: Called when value changes

props.name: onChangeEnd
props.description: Called when user stops dragging slider or changes value with arrows

props.name: orientation
props.description: Slider orientation

props.name: precision
props.description: Number of significant digits after the decimal point

props.name: radius
props.description: Key of theme.radius or any valid CSS value to set border-radius, numbers are converted to rem

props.name: restrictToMarks
props.description: Determines whether the selection should be only allowed from the given marks array

props.name: scale
props.description: A transformation function to change the scale of the slider

props.name: showLabelOnHover
props.description: Determines whether the label should be displayed when the slider is hovered

props.name: size
props.description: Controls size of the track

props.name: step
props.description: Number by which value will be incremented/decremented with thumb drag and arrows

props.name: thumbChildren
props.description: Content rendered inside thumb

props.name: thumbLabel
props.description: Thumb aria-label

props.name: thumbProps
props.description: Props passed down to thumb element

props.name: thumbSize
props.description: Thumb width and height, by default value is computed based on size prop

props.name: value
props.description: Controlled component value
